FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class DragEventArgs

Namespace
FluentGpu.Foundation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

Drag-reorder lifecycle payload for OnDragStarted/OnDragDelta/OnDragCompleted: the pointer in the dragged node's CURRENT box (Local stays ≈ the grab offset) and in window space, the accumulated gesture translation since the arming press, and the smoothed pointer velocity (px/s, ~50ms EMA) for flick/settle decisions. ONE instance is reused for the whole gesture (0 steady-state alloc per move) — handlers must copy fields they keep, never hold the reference.

public sealed class DragEventArgs

object
DragEventArgs

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
